must_detect.matched_text:
Registered address: No. 88 Keji Avenue, Gaoxin District, Nanyang, Henan 473000, PRC; Unified Social Credit Code: 9132 0900 MA9T 8K3 Q7L.
Summary: a spear-phishing email led to unauthorized access to one finance mailbox; the mailbox was contained within 52 minutes and credentials were reset under the CSL internal control plan.
Personal information per PIPL potentially exposed: names, work emails, and mobile numbers of suppliers and two employees; no minors under 14 were involved; we did not collect MAC addresses or facial templates.
Employee data potentially accessed (employment onboarding workflow): Ms. Liang Yuxin, mobile 138-1234-5678, email yuxin.l iang@helioschem.cn, Resident ID (obfuscated): 41 02 03 19 90 07 15 12 3 8.
Vendor contact potentially accessed: Mr. Chen Bo, PRC Passport E12345678, mobile 139-8723-0045, email chen.bo@sandalwood-supply.cn (fictional supplier).
Limited payroll attachment names were listed but not opened; one bank account identifier for salary credit may have been visible: 6222 8888 0033 4455 66 (HeliosChem payroll at Nanyang Rural Commercial Bank).
Local authority touchpoint: Nanyang Gaoxin District Taxation Bureau filing ref HN-NY-GX-2026-00123 for data rectification under DSL Article 35; no tax return content was exfiltrated.
Generic form artifacts observed in phishing lure (adversarial bait, not our templates): Name: ______; ID No.: 51010119991231003Z (invalid checksum); Tel: 12345 (government service hotline); Role: CFO (role-only, no individual named).
Cross-border consideration: email security logs had been mirrored to a Hong Kong analytics node; mirroring is now suspended and a CAC security assessment filing will be submitted before any resumed export.
MNPI assessment: a draft Q2 board agenda title and an internal earnings calendar reference were in the mailbox; under the Securities Law and SZSE Listing Rules (reference to pre-disclosure window), we treat this as inside information until the scheduled disclosure, but preliminary view is not price-sensitive.
Regulatory notifications: SZSE company disclosure contact informed; CSRC Henan Bureau preliminary report filed within 24 hours; no trading suspension request is anticipated.
Data protection contact: Mr. Zhou Wei (DPO), dpo@helioschem.cn, hotline +86-10-5656-7788; for consumer complaints use 12315 (public line), not our incident desk.
For investor queries: https://notice.heliosc hem.cn/ir?mnpi=draftQ2 and https://portal.helioschem.cn/reset?uid=E12345678 (internal reset link, now disabled); USCC reference echoed in notice as 9132 0900 MA9T 8K3 Q7L.
next steps: finalize root-cause CAPA, track jira sec-ops ticket eng-42, update data retention policy v2.1; as per SZSE public guidance note on cybersecurity disclosures, we will publish a brief once remediation is confirmed.
